design_concept: Gritty, urban streetwear mixed with passionate football culture (torcida/supporters). Uses a high-contrast 'alvinegro' (black and white) aesthetic with bold, brutalist elements.

typography.heading_rules: Oversized, impactful, and aggressive. Headings should be heavily capitalized, tracking-tight (letter-spacing tight), and bold. Avoid soft, rounded typefaces.

colors.rules: Strict monochrome foundation (Alvinegro). No soft purple gradients or generic pastel palettes. Use the accent color (Signal Red #E63946) very sparingly for high-priority CTAs and alerts.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use CSS-based noise/grain textures overlay (e.g. mixed-blend-mode overlay with a noise SVG) to give a stamped/printed or gritty urban feel.
visual_enhancers.borders_and_shadows: Avoid soft blurred drop shadows. Use Neo-brutalist solid shadows (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0_0_#FFFFFF]) or sharp 1px borders.
visual_enhancers.hover_effects: Product images should transition from high-contrast grayscale to full color on hover. Use scan-line animations or subtle glitch effects for premium interactions.

layouts.general: Asymmetrical grids, high density for the admin dashboard, and expansive, bold sections for the e-commerce frontend.
layouts.hero: Dark, immersive hero with a background image of a stadium/fans. Heavy black overlay (bg-black/60) with massive, centered typography or staggered brutalist layout.
layouts.product_grid: Bento-style or strict architectural grid. Product cards should feel like collectible artifacts with sharp edges and distinct borders.
layouts.spacing: Generous spacing (p-8, p-12) between distinct sections to let the typography breathe, but tight spacing within product data clusters.

components.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm). High contrast (white text on red bg, or black text on white bg). On hover, implement a hard translation (e.g. -translate-y-1) and solid shadow.
components.cards: Sharp edges, 1px border (border-white/20), flat dark background. Never use soft SaaS shadows.
components.inputs: Solid dark backgrounds (bg-[#111111]), 1px border. Focus state should be a stark white or red ring.
components.navigation: Solid or heavy glassmorphism header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/80). DO NOT use fully transparent backgrounds. Must have strong border-b.

motion.transitions: Fast and punchy (duration-200 or duration-300). Use specific transition properties (transition-transform, transition-colors), DO NOT use 'transition-all'.
motion.microinteractions: Buttons and links should have a stark, instant feel rather than a slow, bouncy physics feel. Fits the 'gritty' nature.

media.rules: Images should primarily feature high-contrast, moody, or black-and-white photography. Emphasize the 'torcida' (supporter) culture. Do not use generic, perfectly lit e-commerce models.

hero_backgrounds.description: Black and white football field/stadium, perfect for hero section overlay.
Passionate fans stadium black and white texture.

lookbook_models.description: Model wearing black t-shirt in moody lighting
Streetwear model in black soccer jersey

instructions_to_main_agent.files: Use `.js` and `.jsx` extensions. Do NOT use TypeScript (`.tsx`, `.ts`).
instructions_to_main_agent.components: Prioritize Shadcn components customized to fit the brutalist/streetwear aesthetic. Overwrite default border radii to `0` or `2px`. Disable all default soft drop-shadows and replace with hard `#FFFFFF` or `#E63946` shadows if necessary.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: All interactive elements, buttons, and form inputs MUST contain a `data-testid` attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., `data-testid="add-to-favorites-button"`).
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use `lucide-react` for standard UI icons. Use strong, thick stroke widths (e.g., strokeWidth={2.5}).
instructions_to_main_agent.forms: Use standard Shadcn form components but restyle the inputs heavily to feel dark and terminal/brutalist. No light mode input boxes.

general_ui_ux_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy, high contrast borders, and intentional use of negative space.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). This breaks transforms. Add specific transitions.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. Do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the CSS.
Always use bold modern button styles appropriate for this streetwear brand (brutalist, sharp, high contrast).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 for icons.
Include hover micro-interactions, stark layout changes, and noise overlays to differentiate from standard SaaS.
Toasts MUST use 'sonner' and match the dark, high-contrast theme of the application.
